chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1918 of 2024 [Manzoor Ahmed & others vs. PO Sindh & others] Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.7206/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 08-10-2025 None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 01-10-2025, the following order was passed; “Learned counsel for the Petitioners to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition as to how the Petitioners being civil servants are seeking their promotions, which falls within the terms and conditions of service, hence the jurisdiction of this Court is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. He seeks time. Time is granted. Matter is adjourned to 08-10-2025. In spite of arguing the matter on the point of maintainability, Counsel for the Petitioners has chosen to remain absent. We have perused the Petition and found that the Petitioners, being civil servants who have an alternate remedy to approach Service Tribunal for redressal of their grievances. The jurisdiction of this Court in view of Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 is barred. In view of above facts, the petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed, leaving it for the Petitioners to seek their remedy available under the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
